typescript.name: check_typescript_all
typescript.description: Runs all enabled TypeScript code quality checks and returns a combined report covering coding style anti-patterns.

features.name: check_typescript_coding_style
features.description: Checks TypeScript coding style violations: no @ts-ignore, no enum declarations, avoid any/Function/Object/{} types, prefer interface over type for objects, exported functions require return types, constrain generic parameters, no as type assertions, and no non-null assertions.
